input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.6.4.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.6.4.5
            TITLE: the lower side impact structure member must connect the bottom of the main hoop and the

            CONTENT:
            rule F.6.4.5: The Lower Side Impact Structure member must connect the bottom of the Main Hoop and the
F.6.4.5 The Lower Side Impact Structure member must connect the bottom of the Main Hoop and the 
bottom of the Front Hoop.
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 39 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: The Lower Side Impact Structure member must connect the bottom of the Main Hoop and the bottom of the Front Hoop.
